conversation.message_text: Birkenstock: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Birkenstock.
Birkenstock: Welcome to Birkenstock! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/8y2
Birkenstock: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!

Birkenstock: CLICK ON THE LINK to reveal your FREE GROUND SHIPPING CODE, good for your next full price purchase:

https://birkenstock.attn.tv/aT367B7eWEHA

Welcome to the family!

Birkenstock: Welcome! I'm Taylor! I see you're eyeing the https://birkenstock.attn.tv/aXejVxwM8oaN 

Do you need any help finding the perfect size?
Hi Taylor, yes thank you.....size 11/42

Birkenstock: Great! The size 11/42 is equivalent to a Birkenstock size 42. This size typically fits those with a standard men's size 11 or a standard women's size 13. If you need more assistance, feel free to ask!
